---
title: "Proposal"
---

## Research question
GLP-1 receptor signaling may regulate downstream genes involved in the cAMP/PKA pathway. In this project, we analyze publicly available data to evaluate whether tissues with higher GLP-1R expression show greater downstream pathway gene activity and whether treatment is associated with increased expression of GLP-1R and its downstream signalling genes compared with untreated samples.

## Dataset(s)
- Source: NCBI GEO Public Dataset (GSE293291)
- https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE293291 
- Sample size: 
    60 samples
- Key variables: 
  1. Tissue type
  2. Genotype
  3. Treatment type
  4. Gene expression measurements
- License/usage: 
    The dataset is publicly available through GEO and includes downloadable processed expression files as well as raw data in SRA. The GEO accession page does not list a separate explicit reuse license, so we cite the GEO accession page when using the data.

## Planned analysis
Describe your plan in bullets:

- Data cleaning and preprocessing
    - Combine expression files into one dataset
    - Match metadata to expression matrix (GSM IDs)
    - Log2 transformation and filtering of low-expression genes
    - Remove zero-variance genes before analysis 

- Cleaning/QC
    - Perform PCA to identify clustering and outliers
    - Evaluate variance explained by principal components
    - Check separation by treatment and genotype

- Visualizations
    - PCA plots for QC
    - Volcano plots for differential expression 
    - Heatmaps of top differentially expressed genes
- Statistical/ML approach
    - Build design matrix based on genotype, treatment, and tissues
    - Fit linear model using limma 
    - Identify differentially expressed genes

- Validation & Intrepretation
    - Compare treated vs untreated groups
        - Peptide Treatment: mGIPR-Ab/P1  
        - Vehicle Treatment
    - Focus on balanced comaprisons
    - Interpret results in context of GLP-1R and cAMP/PKA pathway. 

## Deliverables
- Website sections
- Key figures/tables
    1. PCA Plot for QC
    2. Volcano Plot
    3. Heatmaps
    4. Differential Expression Results Table
- Any optional stretch goals
